title: Implement stat() on AgenticStoreBackend and OPFSBackend
description: Both AgenticStoreBackend (src/backends/agentic-store.ts) and OPFSBackend (src/backends/opfs.ts) are missing the stat() method required by the StorageBackend interface. Implement stat() on both backends to return {size, mtime} for existing files and null for missing files. NodeFsBackend (src/backends/node-fs.ts) is the reference implementation. Required by vision gaps and DBB gap: OPFSBackend.stat() not implemented.
